summary_one_line_zh: 多模态/视频模型继续下沉，产品化Agent和算力军备同步加速。
summary_one_line_en: Multimodal/video models advance while agent products and compute bets accelerate.

items.why_zh: VLM能力继续外扩，端侧/低成本多模态栈的可用上限又抬了一档。
items.why_en: Another step up in practical multimodal capability for low-cost and edge-friendly stacks.
items.so_what_zh: 拿你们最难的图文任务做回归，比较它和现有VLM的失败模式。
items.so_what_en: Run your hardest vision-language evals against it and compare failure modes.

items.why_zh: Agent不再只拼prompt，而是拼插件、沙箱和可审计工具链，架构重点变了。
items.why_en: Agents are shifting from prompts to plugins, sandboxes, and auditability.
items.so_what_zh: 检查你们Agent的工具执行是否可隔离、可回放、可解释。
items.so_what_en: Audit tool execution for isolation, replayability, and explainability.

items.why_zh: 大型公司把自有算力继续押注到专有AI应用，训练/推理供给侧仍在内卷。
items.why_en: Big firms keep shifting proprietary AI onto their own compute; supply-side pressure remains high.
items.so_what_zh: 重新算一遍你们下季度推理成本，别默认GPU供给会变宽松。
items.so_what_en: Reforecast next-quarter inference costs; don’t assume GPU supply will loosen.
